summary: Resolved by PATCH-306-A — github-link footnote added (github.com/john09289/predictions/blob/main/inject_ai_layer.py) so the Spirograph data_source label and the absence-of-analemma-fetch claim in monitor.py are independently verifiable against the live dome repo state.
